form.formComment: Last start 2nd (Sr6) over 2190m at this track was 4th-7.4 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Maggacis (2:44.80) in NR up to 45 on March 27 at $7.50. Two runs back ran on from midfield and won by 1.1 m as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:43.10) beating Keayang Crippa in NR up to 45 on March 20 at $1.60 at the bell was 2nd-7.2. Favour others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired to be beaten 64m into 7th placing.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr5) over 1750m at Swan Hill, at the bell was 9th-15 beaten 19 m by Happenstbabeachboy (2:06.10) in NR 45 to 50 on March 31 at $11. Two runs back won by 1.0 m when quickly away, (Fr4) at this track (2:12.10) beating G B Brave in NR up to 50 on March 20 at $6 at the bell was leading 1.6. Prefer in something a bit easier.

At the start before game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 2190m after showing early speed at this track was 2nd-12.4 at the bell, beaten 4.5 m by Dallas Miki (2:39.30) in NR 51 to 55 on March 20 at $6.50. Forward showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to tire leaving the 500m mark to be beaten 58.1m.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Ran on from midfield and posted a big 5 m win as favourite hunging in on scoring up, (Sr5) at this track (2:44.80) beating Apology Accepted in NR up to 45 on March 27 at $1.50 at the bell was leading 4. Two runs back came from midfield and won by 25 m as favourite hunging in on scoring up, (Sr1) at this track (2:42.90) beating Grenade in NR up to 45 on March 20 at $1.20 at the bell was leading 2.4. Well placed, should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in approaching the front straight on the first occasion.
Broke approaching the winning post on the first occasion.

form.formComment: Solid run when a close second after being driven well back, behind Keayang Sweetheart at Geelong over 1609m in a NR up to 55 on March 13 at $1.70. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing second behind Morris Brown at Terang over 1680m in a NR up to 55 on March 27 at $1.55. Strong winning hope.

Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing second behind Morris Brown at Terang over 1680m in a NR up to 55 on March 27 at $1.55. Strong winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out in the score up and was out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Resuming after nine months off the scene. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into ninth behind Vincent Grange at Bendigo over 2150m in a 0-1 WIN on July 23 at $9. Plenty to like about his prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming after nine months off the scene. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into ninth behind Vincent Grange at Bendigo over 2150m in a 0-1 WIN on July 23 at $9. Plenty to like about his prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped during the latter stages of the score up.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Sr3) over 1790m at this track was 7th-9.4 at the bell, beaten 19 m by Hooklineandsinker (2:11.00) in NR 52 to 56 on March 27 at $10. Showed ability the run before when he won by 7 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at this track (2:12.10) beating Indianas Son in 0-3 WINs on March 20 at $2.40 at the bell was leading 0.4. Sure to be about the money.
